name: logistics fleet supervisors managing 10-20 vehicles tool
description: For logistics fleet supervisors managing 10-20 vehicles, inefficient scheduling causes compliance risks. We automate tracking and scheduling instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem_solved: Inefficient scheduling and tracking of vehicle safety inspections.
